title: narcissus bulbocodium var. gallicus
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. gallicus, also known as the striped narcissus or Poet's Narcissus, is a species of flowering plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus bulbocodium var. gallicus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and grinding the bulbs, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
